steps.goal: Convert room and facility measurements from metric to imperial units for international guest comfort guides
Calculate occupancy rate projections and revenue estimates for the upcoming season
Review financial formulas for calculating profit margins and break-even points
Generate practice math problems for staff training on billing and measurement calculations

user_agent_config.personality: Business-minded and detail-oriented, values precision and professionalism. Prefers practical solutions that can be immediately applied to improving resort operations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in hospitality management and business operations but not specialized in advanced mathematics. Familiar with basic calculations but relies on tools for complex conversions and formulas. Does not know internal tool names or technical APIs.

end_condition: The user has obtained all necessary conversions, calculations, formulas, and practice problems to support their resort's operational needs and staff training.
